commands.review_summary:
The PR extends `openclaw sessions --json` rows with existing `SessionEntry` subagent lineage fields and adds a focused sessions command regression test.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: create or point `openclaw sessions --store <path> --json` at a store row with `spawnedBy` and the other existing `SessionEntry` fields, and current main’s row adapter drops them before JSON emission. I did not run the CLI because this review is read-only and no real store proof was provided.
commands.review_followup: Contributor real CLI proof and maintainer acceptance of the additive JSON contract are needed; there is no narrow automated repair to request against this PR.

target.title: fix(sessions): include subagent metadata in json
target.body:
## Summary
- add existing subagent lineage fields to sessions JSON rows
- cover store-backed JSON output for spawned session metadata

Fixes #80286

## Real behavior proof
After the fix, `openclaw sessions --json` rows include the stored subagent lineage fields instead of dropping them from the JSON projection. Local terminal output from the focused sessions command check:

```text
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/sessions.test.ts
✓ src/commands/sessions.test.ts
15 passed
```

## Testing
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/sessions.test.ts
- git diff --check
target.author: yuanhanzhong
